programs.title: Kangaroo Beach
programs.desc: Island Campout: Camping out overnight on Boomerang Island with the cadets, Frizzy goes on a late night hunt for an alien koala.

programs.title: The Octonauts
programs.desc: When a storm washes Peso onto a mysterious, rocky island, he meets a band of lobster-like insects thought to be extinct.

programs.title: Bluey Fancy Restaurant
programs.desc: Rya, Kai, and Zee run a loud, colourful cafe with fried rice, fairy bread, and waiters who eat the food. It's chaotic, hilarious, and pure Chattermax energy.

programs.title: Play School: Rainforest Rangers
programs.desc: Rangers Abi and Luke pack their bags with everything they need for all kinds of rainforest weather! They use different items to make storm sounds and tell the story of a sugar glider searching for somewhere to sleep.

programs.title: Fireman Sam
programs.desc: A pesky mole causes trouble for Moose when the mole decides that Moose's Wild Man Golf Course is the perfect place to build a few molehills.
